heading: MongoDB Charts Tutorials
body:
The following [MongoDB Charts](charts) tutorials guide you through
visualizing sample data provided by Atlas:[Visualizing Order Data](charts/tutorial/order-data/order-data-tutorial-overview)Visualize the [Sample Supply Store Dataset](sample-supplies), which contains sales order data
from a mock office supply company.[Visualizing Movie Details](charts/tutorial/movie-details/movie-details-tutorial-overview)Visualize the [Sample Mflix Dataset](sample-mflix), which contains data on movies and
movie theaters.> **Tip:** 
>
> To visualize data in MongoDB Charts from the Atlas UI, click
> Visualize Your Data when viewing a specific database
> or collection. Charts loads the data source and you can
> start building a chart in the Charts view. For detailed
> steps, see [Build Charts](charts/build-charts).
